{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Leah's surveillance crystal
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Leah]] has a hidden surveillance crystal.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c8">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate artifacts]]
